title: Empty AVG(decimal(3,1)) returns -1.7976931348623158E307
key_bug_features: AVG function on empty decimal field returns incorrect value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value DECIMAL(3,1));
INSERT INTO test_table1 (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (field DECIMAL(3,1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table1 UNION SELECT AVG(field) FROM test_table2;
